purpose.question: Can independently seeded natural source/target anchors in the exact same carrier provide a stable context-matched vowel direction and reproduce the twelve typed-core candidates already accepted by the immutable Praat evidence ladder?
purpose.relationship_to_failed_spectral_screen: This changes the validation design, not the feature extractor or thresholds. The failed cross-context spectral result remains immutable and contributes no candidates. Context matching is tested only on previously accepted reference candidates in this calibration.
purpose.scientific_boundary: A passing calibration makes the context-matched replicated-anchor instrument eligible for a separately frozen evaluation of failed cells. It does not itself rescue a cell, validate a listener profile, or promote product support.

replicated_anchor_rendering.renderer: Kokoro 0.9.4 with the already pinned model and four voice hashes
replicated_anchor_rendering.shared_state_per_condition: Within each natural condition, text state, predicted durations, F0, predicted noise, voice, style, and speed are computed once; only the decoder seed changes.
replicated_anchor_rendering.baseline_parity: The baseline-seed PCM for every source and target condition must exactly match the immutable v1 natural-anchor PCM hash before the three training seeds count.
replicated_anchor_rendering.training_audio_retention: Record hashes, sizes, peaks, feature receipts, and measurements; retain no new WAV files because the pinned renderer, plan, voice, and seeds reproduce them.

context_matched_validation.context_rule: Each source/target endpoint is trained and evaluated only within the identical voice, rule, carrier slot, occurrence, consonant shell, and target position.
context_matched_validation.scaler_rule: Robust feature scaling uses only the same voice's three-seed natural anchors from other complete logical slots; the current slot and every controlled candidate are excluded.
context_matched_validation.natural_seed_cross_validation: For each of three seeds, source and target centroids use the other two seeds from that exact occurrence; the heldout natural pair is then classified.
context_matched_validation.occurrence_anchor_gate: At least two of three heldout natural pairs must be exact-category and no natural pair may have negative source-to-target direction cosine.
context_matched_validation.cell_anchor_gate: All four frozen occurrences across all three carrier slots must pass the occurrence anchor gate.
context_matched_validation.candidate_gate: The heldout baseline-seed neutral/lens candidate is classified against three-seed endpoint centroids. Every occurrence must be at least directional for a directional cell and exact for an exact cell.
context_matched_validation.identity_negative_control: Every reference neutral compared with itself must fail the movement gate.

reference_candidate_ladder.selection_rule: Use the latest first-passing immutable automatic evidence rung for each typed-core cell: v8, then word-context, then full-context, then adaptive-strength. No failed cell is evaluated during calibration.

global_instrument_sanity.reference_concordance_definition: The complete cell passes context-matched natural-anchor validation and the already accepted candidate remains directional-only or exact-category.
global_instrument_sanity.failure_effect: A failed global gate rejects this context-matched instrument for supplementing evidence. No failed cell may be inspected or reclassified under it.

claim_limits.calibration_only: This run evaluates natural-anchor stability and previously accepted references; it generates no new product candidate or rescue.
claim_limits.spectral_category: A later eligible pass would support broad context-matched spectral direction, not exact F1/F2 realization.
claim_limits.nasal_and_rhotic: The instrument does not independently validate nasality or rhoticity; their dedicated gates remain mandatory.
claim_limits.listener_profile: Acoustic detectability does not prove that the transformation recreates Brazilian-Portuguese or American-English perception.
claim_limits.human_qc: Every enabled voice-rule cell still requires blind naturalness, direction, artifact, semantic-opacity, and interference QC.
claim_limits.product: Nothing in this run enables a rule, voice, service, flag, deployment, or arbitrary typed-input claim.

stopping_rule.instruction: Render every baseline and training seed once, analyze all 144 occurrences, preserve any failure, and stop before evaluating the 24 failed typed-core cells.
